deploy.preDeployCommand: php artisan config:clear && php artisan migrate --force && php artisan tinker --execute="if (\\App\\Models\\User::count() === 0) { \\Illuminate\\Support\\Facades\\Artisan::call('db:seed', ['--force' => true]); }"
deploy.startCommand: php artisan config:cache && php artisan serve --host=0.0.0.0 --port=$PORT
